About

About Me

A quick introduction to the mindset, technical foundation, and learning attitude behind the work.

Hello! I'm Deepak Rawat, a motivated BCA student and frontend developer focused on responsive websites, React interfaces, and clean JavaScript experiences. I enjoy turning simple ideas into polished pages with clear structure, good spacing, smooth interaction, and mobile-friendly layouts. My foundation includes C, C++, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, debugging, and practical problem solving.
